yaml.description-meta: Aaron J Girard - Research Geophysicist at Colorado School of Mines

markdown.markdown:
:::{#hero-heading} Center for Wave Phenomena Geophysics Department Colorado School of Mines Golden, CO 80401-1877, USA Email: agirard [at] mines.edu ## About Me I am a researcher at the [Center for Wave Phenomena](https://cwp.mines.edu/) in the Geophysics Department at [Colorado School of Mines](https://www.mines.edu/). My work spans seismic data processing and imaging, ambient/passive seismic monitoring, and high-performance computing applications in geophysics. I am actively involved in developing open-source tools for the geophysics community, including contributions to the [DASCORE](https://dascore.org/) distributed fiber optic sensing library and [Madagascar](https://www.reproducibility.org/) software for reproducible computational experiments. ## Brief Vitae ### Education | Year | Degree | University | |------|--------|------------| | 2019 | PhD Geophysics | University of Western Australia | | 2010 | MSc Applied Geophysics | IDEA League (Technische Universiteit Delft, Eidgenössische Technische Hochschule Zürich, Rheinisch-Westfälische Technische Hochschule Aachen) | | 2007 | BSc Geophysical Engineering | Colorado School of Mines | ### Employment | Year | Position | Institute/Company | |------|----------|-------------------| | 2022– | Research Associate | Colorado School of Mines | | 2019–2021 | Postdoctoral Researcher | Colorado School of Mines | | 2020–2022 | Geophysical Consultant | Nawii LLC | | 2019 | Processing Geophysicist | Down Under Geosolutions | | 2013–2014 | Co-founder and CEO | RARE Services, LLC. | | 2010–2013 | Geophysicist | WesternGeco | | 2009–2010 | Processing Geophysicist | PGS | | 2010 | Geophysics Intern | Ion GXT | | 2008–2009 | Geophysics Intern | Hess Corporation | | 2007 | Geophysics Intern | Norsk Hydro, ASA | | 2006–2007 | Laboratory Assistant | Colorado School of Mines - Rock Abuse Laboratory | | 2006 | Doodlebugging Intern | Global Geophysical Services | ### Collaborating Organisations - [Society of Exploration Geophysicists](http://www.seg.org/) - [European Association of Geoscientists and Engineers](http://www.eage.org/) ::: ```{=html}

Where my coauthors are

Hover an institution Each red dot marks somewhere I have a coauthor.
View full collaborator map →
```
